name: Faster Inference
desc: +5 LOC per prompt — the model runs a bit quicker now

name: Extended Context
desc: +15 LOC per prompt — longer context window, more output per call

name: Improved Reasoning
desc: +30 LOC per prompt

name: Latest Weights
desc: +70 LOC per prompt — just updated. the bugs are different now.

name: Prompt Engineering
desc: 2× manual output

name: Few-Shot Examples
desc: 3× manual output

name: XML Tags in Prompts
desc: 4× manual output (it just works, inexplicably)

name: Chain of Thought
desc: 1.5× all generators

name: Extended Thinking
desc: 2× all generators (it pauses for a very long time first)

name: Unit Tests
desc: −40% bug generation

name: ESLint
desc: −20% bug generation, +100% squiggles

name: TypeScript
desc: −50% bug generation (after initial +200% bug introduction phase)

name: Mandatory Code Review
desc: −55% bugs, −30% output (humans are slow)

name: AI Code Review
desc: restores output speed; bug generation increases significantly

name: CI/CD Pipeline
desc: −60% bugs; CI runs your tests automatically — fixRate += tests × 0.03/s

name: Parallel Agents
desc: 2× agent LOC/s — two agents, neither aware of the other

name: Account Rotation
desc: Script cycles through free accounts automatically. +350 max tokens, +12/s regen

name: Pay for Access
desc: Introduces money as a resource. +1400 max tokens, +30/s regen. Costs $5/s.

name: Team Plan
desc: +8000 max tokens, +150/s regen. Expensive. Worth it. Probably.

name: Revamp the Status Page
desc: Reported reliability is now managed independently of system state. Introduces nines.

name: 5 Nines SLA
desc: Contractually guaranteed. Bumps reported reliability to 99.999%.

name: 6 Nines Guarantee
desc: 99.9999%. The lawyers asked how we measure this. We changed the subject.

name: 7 Nines Engineering
desc: 99.99999%. A rounding error, technically.

name: The Eight Nines Protocol
desc: Nines become a resource. The status page now just shows the number.

name: Automated Bug Bounty
desc: Bug reports now convert to nines automatically. Slow but continuous.

name: Enhanced Bug Bounty
desc: Higher conversion rate. The bugs are working for us now.

name: Chaos Engineering
desc: We break things on purpose. Nines accumulate passively. +0.005/s.
